channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: New York Session: Quiet Forex Session as Markets Await Fresh Catalysts — Thu, 14 May 2026
item.description: New York is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the US session. Forex markets traded in tight ranges with most major currencies showing neutral bias as traders await fresh data and central bank guidance.

item.title: Asia GBP Weakens Bearish Pressure
item.description: Previous daily forex insight from the FXNewsBias sentiment engine.
